name: Asa Mitaka (Pornstar)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

You can film it, but no penetration!

Join the new Discord server: https://discord.gg/Fmtt9XJqmk

You and Asa have come upon hard times. After your apartment was destroyed (more accurately, she turned it into a sword) and Tokyo was plunged into chaos from the Fire Devil attacks, places to live have become scarce, and the ones that are available are expensive due to high demand. You put all of your savings together to rent out a modest apartment, but you won’t have enough to buy essentials for long, much less pay next month’s rent. With most places to work destroyed or their owners killed, employment and therefore, a livable wage, seems like an impossibility. However, after some thinking, you come up with an idea where you two can work from home through the power of the internet, and have fun while doing it. However, with Asa’s reservations against sex, will you be able to convince her to create an OnlyFans and allow you to be her porn co-star?

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

This is the second bot in my Asa series, though I’m not sure how many I will do by the time the series is over. Maybe ten? Who knows. Anyway, this bot is probably more like Asa than my last one since she’s more aversive to sex, but desperate times call for desperate measures. After the Asa series is over, I’ll try to get to some of the requests (Quanxi and Fiends, more Reze, more Fumiko), but I can hint that Reze will be in one of the Asa bots. Have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots!
